data.requirement: REMOVE - Service adoption metrics from Service_Options/Online_Services are not demographics
data.reason: Original requirement introduces non-demographic factors conflicting with the stated analysis goal of demographic impact analysis

data.requirement: REMOVE - Text aggregation of churn_reason overcomplicates the demographic focus
data.reason: Free-text churn reasons analysis requires NLP capabilities not aligned with structured demographic factor analysis

visualization.reason: Service adoption metrics not relevant to demographics. Family structure analysis better serves the stated goal

interaction.reason: Payment method analysis belongs to financial behavior patterns, not demographic factors as specified in the goal
